title: Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir
tagline: Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir, Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Ved Mata Gaytri Temple is a Hindu temple of the Maa Gayatri Devi.
overview.description: Ved Mata Gaytri Temple is a Hindu temple of the Maa Gayatri Devi. The name Gayatri Mandir derives from the Acharya of Gayatri Mission, Gaytari Mandir is a famous Temple. The Gayatri Mandir is founded by Mr. Rampravesh Kushwaha.This Temple is situated in Kushinagar, Uttar Pradesh, India since a long time.

topPlaces.name: Ramkola
topPlaces.description: Ramkola is a town and a nagar panchayat in Kushinagar district which is also known as Padrauna district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. Geographically Ramkola is a fertile agricultural region and is known for large scale sugarcane cultivation.

items.note: Ramkola is a town and a nagar panchayat in Kushinagar district which is also known as Padrauna district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. Geographically Ramkola is a fertile agricultural region and is known for large scale sugarcane cultivation.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (182 km) and the nearest railway station is Gorakhpur Junction (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Ved Mata Gaytri Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
